ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person using a white cane for guidance.  The left arm will hold the cane and swing naturally with the walking motion, while the right arm will move naturally. The movement should reflect a steady, confident gait. The robot will use its two joints to produce a natural-looking arm swing.  Frame 1 will show the initial position, Frame 2 will show the left arm slightly back, Frame 3 will show the left arm forward, and Frame 4 will show a return to the initial position. The right arm will move in a complementary motion, but less dramatically, to mirror a natural walking motion.  Frame 5 will show a similar position to Frame 1, completing the walking cycle.

frames.beat: arms swing gently, a steady walking pace
left arm swings back, right arm forward
left arm swings forward, right arm back
arms return to a natural walking swing
the steady gait continues, forward motion
